rewrite.erArrival: You arrived at the Emergency department
rewrite.claimed: Your doctor is now reviewing you
rewrite.admit: You're being admitted for further care
rewrite.transfer: Transfer being arranged to another facility
rewrite.labOrdered: Your doctor ordered some lab tests
rewrite.imagingOrdered: Your doctor ordered an imaging scan

consent.title: Consent needed
consent.body: Live tracking for {name} shares ward, care-team and progress with whoever holds this link. Continue only if you are the patient or an authorized family member.
consent.note: Your consent is recorded. You can ask the hospital to revoke this link anytime.

gate.expiredBody: This tracking link has expired for the patient's privacy.
gate.requiredBody: This page needs the secure link sent to you by SMS — the patient ID alone can't open it.

notFound.title: Agentix HIMS
notFound.body: Patient ID <mono>{uhid}</mono> not found. Check the link from your SMS — UHIDs look like <sampleMono>{sample}</sampleMono>.

critical.concern: If you have any concerns, please speak with the duty doctor at the nursing station.

timeline.title: Hospital updates
timeline.empty: You're registered. Updates will start appearing as your visit progresses.

help.label: Need help?
help.body: For urgent concerns about your patient, speak with the duty doctor at the nursing station first.

footer: Agentix HIMS · This is a live tracking page · Updates every 10 seconds
